zh.{Blddn ap Cnfn}: 義大利馬阿斯可利 派諾

zh.lifeSummary: 當John de la Pole於1357年出生在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾時，他的父親Sir Wilcock de la Pole33歲，母親Margred Margaret Ferch Thomas26歲。他於1380年與Katherine de Corbet結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1388年被列為high sheriff of shropshire。他去世於1403年11月3日在英國威爾斯梅利奧爾享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de la Pole于1357年出生在威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾时，他的父亲Sir Wilcock de la Pole33岁，母亲Margred Margaret Ferch Thomas26岁。他于1380年与Katherine de Corbet结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1388年被列为high sheriff of shropshire。他去世于1403年11月3日在英国威尔斯梅利奧爾享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Pole
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Leicestershire): variant of   Paul   or   Poole  .
Americanized form of German   Pohle   or   Pohl  .

variants.name: Poles
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Livio, Primo, Santo.
English and Welsh: variant of Pole and Powell + genitival or excrescent -s.
Italian (Friuli and Veneto): probably a derivative of the personal name   Polo  . It is also found in Slovenia.

variants.name: Paul
meanings: English, French, German, Dutch, Swedish, West Indian (mainly Haiti, also e.g. Saint Lucia), and African (mainly Nigeria and Tanzania): from the personal name Paul (from Latin Paulus ‘small’), which has always been popular in Christendom. It was the name adopted by the Pharisee Saul of Tarsus after his conversion to Christianity on the road to Damascus in about AD 34. He was a most energetic missionary to the Gentiles in the Roman Empire, and played a very significant role in establishing Christianity as a major world religion. The name was borne also by numerous other early Christian saints. It is also occasionally borne by Jews; the reasons for this are not clear. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages and their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Greek Pavlis , Slovenian Pavel and Pavlič (see Pavlic ), Polish Paweł (see Pawel ) and Pawlicki , Assyrian/Chaldean Polous and Polus . In France, this surname is most common in Brittany (see 2 below).
Breton (mainly Finistère): from a Frenchified form of the personal name Paol, Breton form of Paul .
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Phóil ‘son of Paul’. Compare McFall .

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: When John de la Pole was born in 1357, in Montgomeryshire, Wales, his father, Sir Wilcock de la Pole, was 33 and his mother, Margred Margaret Ferch Thomas, was 26. He married Katherine de Corbet in 1380. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. In 1388, at the age of 31, his occupation is listed as high sheriff of shropshire. He died on 3 November 1403, in Merionethshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de la Pole est né en 1357, à Montgomeryshire, Galles, son père, Sir Wilcock de la Pole, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Margred Margaret Ferch Thomas, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Katherine de Corbet en 1380. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. En 1388, à l’âge de 31 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est high sheriff of shropshire. Il est décédé le 3 novembre 1403, à Merionethshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de la Pole 1357 in Montgomeryshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Wilcock de la Pole 33 und seine Mutter Margred Margaret Ferch Thomas 26. Er hat 1380 Katherine de Corbet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. 1388, als er 31 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als high sheriff of shropshire aufgeführt. Er starb am 3. November 1403 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Merionethshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de la Pole è nato il nel 1357 nel Montgomeryshire, Galles, il suo padre, Sir Wilcock de la Pole, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Margred Margaret Ferch Thomas, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Katherine de Corbet nel 1380. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Nel 1388, all'età di 31 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come high sheriff of shropshire. Morì il 3 novembre 1403, nel Merionethshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 46 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: John de la Pole(이)가 1357년 웨일스 몽고머이실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Wilcock de la Pole(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Margred Margaret Ferch Thomas(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1380년 Katherine de Corbet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1388년, 31세의 나이로 그의 직업은 high sheriff of shropshire이었다. 그는 1403년 11월 3일 영국 웨일스 머이오네스실르에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de la Pole nasceu em 1357, em Montgomeryshire, Gales, seu pai, Sir Wilcock de la Pole, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Margred Margaret Ferch Thomas, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine de Corbet em 1380. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Em 1388, com 31 anos, sua profissão aparece como high sheriff of shropshire. Ele faleceu em 3 de novembro de 1403, em Merionethshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de la Pole родился в 1357 г. в местности монтгомиришир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Sir Wilcock de la Pole было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Margred Margaret Ferch Thomas, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine de Corbet в 1380 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. В 1388 году, в возрасте 31 год,  он работал по профессии high sheriff of shropshire. Он умер 3 ноября 1403 г. в местности мириоунетшир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de la Pole nació en 1357, en Montgomeryshire, Gales, su papá, Sir Wilcock de la Pole, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Margred Margaret Ferch Thomas, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Katherine de Corbet en 1380. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. En 1388, a la edad de 31 años, su ocupación registrada era high sheriff of shropshire. Murió el 3 de noviembre de 1403, en Merionethshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 46 años.
